name: Rice and Broccoli Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
1. Saute onion and celery in oleo until soft.
2. Cook rice according to package directions.
3. Cook broccoli separately according to package directions.
4. Mix all ingredients together in a two-quart baking dish.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
6. This casserole can be prepared in advance and stored in the refrigerator.
